target: 3. Where is the Policeman?
…I don't see anyone who looks like a police officer.

Uh, Totsumura-san.
Didn't the backup from the mainland
come on that ship?
That's what we expected, but…

Maybe…
Since Totsumura wasn't around,
he might have gone to town first.
Yeah… I had no idea at all.
T, I was late, I know.

But there was no choice.
I had to go back to the station
for an urgent matter…

Well, it's done. What's important now
is figuring out where the backup police officer
went.
Can't we contact them somehow?

No response on the phone.
It's better to go look for them ourselves.
Then… let's head back to town.

No police officer in sight.
I thought they might be doing an investigation…

I asked the store owners, but
no one saw anyone like that.

That means the only possibility
is that Totsumura-san went to check…

Hey, Shinpei, Mio!
You were here this whole time?!

Ah, Totsumura.
How was the station?
Did the police officer come?

No, they weren't there.
No one came to visit either.

It seems Totsumura-san passed us by
at the station.
So where exactly…
Mio.
Ah, Tokiko.

Strange combination.
Something happen?
Ah, yeah… um…
( I understand Mio's feelings )

( How to explain everything so far… 
I can't put it into words right away… )

Hey, Shin-chan…
It might be better to tell Tokiko too.
If she doesn't know, it might be dangerous…
Maybe.

If there's something I can't be told,
you don't have to force me…

No, it's not that.
It's just… something hard to believe…

Plus… even we don't fully understand
the details…
If you're okay with it, I'll tell you…
Yes, please.
What you said earlier… can I believe it?

Yeah…
It might be hard to believe…

I still don't really feel it yet…
But…
Mio…

Also… about that shadow…
It's not just one or two.

What?!
You didn't tell me that, Shinpei?!

Didn't you say, Totsumura-san?
That the Shadow Sickness
has been passed down on this island?

If that's the case, there might be
other shadows too.
( Shiori-chan is already a shadow now… )

( On the verge of death…
I saw the real Totsumura-san being killed
by the shadow Mio, and then the shadow Totsumura-san was born )

( If other shadows are also killing people
to increase their numbers… )
( That's been going on for a long time… )

That's crazy!
If the shadows target the Hero of Justice,
I'll be in trouble!
Anyway, we need to find the backup police officer!

…But I need backup more than ever now!!
I'll go back to the station and contact them!!
Mio, let's go!
Y-yeah!
Tokiko, be careful!
Yeah, Mio… be careful too.
